chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-341 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 18.08.2025. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General. ---------------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022 which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 21.03.2022 which is also over 03 years ago. In the last 03 years petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Today learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non- prosecution alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
